test.create_query: CREATE TABLE ints_fast (i64 Int64, i32 Int32, i16 Int16, i8 Int8) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO ints_fast SELECT number AS i64, i64 AS i32, i64 AS i16, i64 AS i8 FROM numbers(3000000)
INSERT INTO ints_fast SELECT 10000 + number % 1000 AS i64, i64 AS i32, i64 AS i16, i64 AS i8 FROM numbers(3000000)
INSERT INTO ints_fast SELECT 20000 + number % 100 AS i64, i64 AS i32, i64 AS i16, i64 AS i8 FROM numbers(3000000)
INSERT INTO ints_fast SELECT 30000 + number % 10 AS i64, i64 AS i32, i64 AS i16, i64 AS i8 FROM numbers(3000000)
INSERT INTO ints_fast SELECT 40000 + number % 1 AS i64, i64 AS i32, i64 AS i16, i64 AS i8 FROM numbers(3000000)
test.query: SELECT COUNT() FROM ints_fast l INNER JOIN ints_fast r USING i64 WHERE i32 = 1000042
SELECT COUNT() FROM ints_fast l INNER JOIN ints_fast r ON l.i64 = r.i64 WHERE i32 = 1000042
SELECT COUNT() FROM ints_fast l INNER JOIN ints_fast r USING i64 WHERE i32 IN(42, 500042, 1000042, 1500042, 2000042)
SELECT COUNT() FROM ints_fast l LEFT JOIN ints_fast r USING i64 WHERE i32 = 1000042
SELECT COUNT() FROM ints_fast l LEFT JOIN ints_fast r USING i64 WHERE i32 IN(42, 500042, 1000042, 1500042, 2000042)
SELECT COUNT() FROM ints_fast l RIGHT JOIN ints_fast r USING i64 WHERE i32 = 1000042
SELECT COUNT() FROM ints_fast l RIGHT JOIN ints_fast r USING i64,i32,i16,i8 WHERE i32 = 1000042
SELECT COUNT() FROM ints_fast l RIGHT JOIN ints_fast r ON l.i64 = r.i64 WHERE i32 = 1000042
SELECT COUNT() FROM ints_fast l RIGHT JOIN ints_fast r USING i64 WHERE i32 IN(42, 500042, 1000042, 1500042, 2000042)
